title: Task
description: Schema for an individual task within a project-management-plugin project

id.description: Unique task identifier in T-{number} format

description.description: Detailed description of what the task must accomplish and any relevant context

phase.description: ID of the parent phase this task belongs to

level.description: Granularity level in the 5-level decomposition hierarchy

status.description: Current execution state of the task

priority.description: Relative importance used for autonomous loop scheduling

estimate_minutes.description: Original time estimate in minutes (1–480 / up to 8 hours)

actual_minutes.description: Actual time taken in minutes; null until the task is COMPLETE

dependencies.description: IDs of tasks that must reach COMPLETE before this task can begin

subtasks.description: IDs of child tasks decomposed from this task

completion_criteria.description: Unambiguous, binary-testable acceptance criteria; each item must be independently verifiable

research_file.description: Relative path to the research brief file (e.g. research/T-42.md) within the project state directory; null until research phase is complete

external_id.description: The ID or key of the corresponding issue/card/item in the connected PM platform; null when no PM integration is active

tags.description: Freeform labels for filtering and grouping (e.g. 'frontend', 'auth', 'breaking-change')

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the task is BLOCKED; null for all other statuses

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task was created

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task reached COMPLETE status; null until then
